TEXT:

records.delta_text: A single ship crashed when it landed onto its current trajectory, causing an anomaly that would cause more problems than any other human race's approach to science. The study of how we perceive systems has been used by many governments around the world for years (and several such programs) on spaceflight...until today. In one example, some have even speculated that NASA was testing electromagnetic waves near distant objects or stars like those found between Earth and Mars; but none claim anything definitive about what occurred
